title: Quran, Sura 53: An-Najm
description: Sura 53 (An-Najm: The Star) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 53 (An-Najm: The Star) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: By the star when it descends, your companion has not strayed, nor has he erred. Nor does he speak from his own inclination. It is not but a revelation revealed.
